googleMapsEmbedQuery: Day Hill Automotive Inc, 701 Day Hill Road, Windsor, CT 06095
about: Founded in 1979, Day Hill Automotive is a family-owned auto repair shop that has proudly served the Windsor, Connecticut community for over 45 years. Their ASE-certified mechanics specialize in domestic, foreign, and exotic vehicles, using current automotive technology to deliver high-quality repair and maintenance service. With honest communication during every repair process and a commitment to the safety of customers and their families, Day Hill Automotive has earned a stellar 4.9 out of 5 star rating from nearly 800 reviews.

designBrief.colorDirection: gunmetal grey, electric blue accents, dark asphalt, white
designBrief.inspiration: Modern auto shop. Technical precision aesthetic. Trust signals front and center.
designBrief.avoidance: No generic car stock photos. No red/racing aesthetic. Must not reuse fonts from other sites in this project.
designBrief.heroStyle: Dark industrial background, technical sans-serif type, blue accent highlights
designBrief.uniqueElement: Animated service checklist or diagnostic code display effect
